content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.28% with Metal/Energy/Auto leading, PSU Banks lagging. VIX easing -3.97% to 17.65 indicates risk appetite improving but not euphoric. Book is 60% deployed with modest +0.25% session P&L; priority is position management (trailing SLs on winners) over new adds. Several positions need SL trails after favorable moves.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.9% but SL at 76.50 still holds with CMP 79.10. Strong Q4 (PAT +35%) and PSU bank sector strength intact despite today's softness. Holding original SL — tightening would risk premature stopout in volatile PSU bank tape. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+7.0% unrealized — current SL 1032.38 is already above entry 984 (locked-in ~5% gain). No change needed; SL already trails effectively. Emitting as HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-1.1% within tolerance, SL 119 well-defined. Defensive position with FOMC this week could swing either way. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at +1.4%, CMP 1432.90 near 52w high. Tightening SL from 1413 to 1418 to lock in breakeven+ on this strong FMCG name post-blockbuster Q4. Stellar fundamentals (PAT +27%, Rev +23%); ride to target 1465."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "-3.2%, CMP 2296.90 just above SL 2295 — on the edge. Q4 results Apr 30 (binary in 2 days). SL is tight; let market decide. Will not loosen, will not exit pre-results given Nestle read-through could be supportive. If SL hits, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, CMP 412.50. Tightening SL from 406 to 408 (above entry 404.50) — locks in gain. Strong sector tailwind (record demand 256GW), EDF nuclear partnership. Target 425 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1775.00,
      "new_target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Recovered from -1.3% earlier — now CMP 1797.80, near 52w high 1824. Tightening SL from 1770 to 1775 marginally. Sector momentum strong but stock has rallied +39% in April, overbought risk real. Keeping reasonable room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, post-Organon $11.75bn acquisition news. Mixed signal — large debt-funded deal; analyst views split. SL 1720 reasonable. Hold, no trail yet (needs >2% move)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 320.30, SL 318. Position barely moved; no trail justified yet. Strong sector backdrop, Kenya JV positive. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PIRAMALFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.36% breakout to 52w high, but extended intraday from 1880 low to 2004. Chasing a +8% gap up is poor R/R. Watch for consolidation."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat headline strong but quality weak — other income drove 30% of profit growth, FY26 production -2%, inventory +21% YoY. Stock already +3.94% post-results. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Results today 5:45 PM IST — binary event, stock up +6.7% into print. Avoid pre-event entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +65%) but stock gapped down -2.6% from 1062 high to 1036 — sell-the-news. Already have 3 financial names exposure (PNBHOUSING, MAHABANK). Cluster discipline."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 76.50 intact; thesis on PSU bank Q4 strength still valid."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1032.38 already trails above entry — locks in +5%. Let target 1110 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position; FOMC this week — hold through event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to lock breakeven+ on strong FMCG winner near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "On SL edge pre-Q4 results Apr 30. Let SL execute if breached; no loosening."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL above entry to lock in gain on sector-favored PSU power name."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1775.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal tighten as stock approaches 52w high; preserve some room given volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just barely positive post-Organon news; not enough move to justify trail. SL 1720 fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position barely moved; original SL adequate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MARUTI results post-close today — re-evaluate tomorrow based on print and guidance. HINDUNILVR Q4 on Apr 30 — key event for existing position. AUBANK and PIRAMALFIN to be watched for pullback entries after profit-taking. ULTRACEMCO at support could be interesting if it stabilizes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with 9 positions across PSU Bank, Financials, Gold, FMCG (2), Power/Energy (3), Pharma. Power/Energy cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER) totals ~22% of capital — at cluster discipline limit, no more power adds. Three pending OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) need attention — TATAPOWER pending order overlaps with power cluster cap and should be cancelled if it doesn't fill soon. Net P&L +0.25% intraday, +0.41% experiment-to-date. Focus next ticks on managing existing book through earnings season rather than chasing breakouts. FOMC + multiple Q4 results this week = elevated event risk."
}
